endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Deployment.Admin/locations/global/productPackages/{productId}/secrets
endpoints.description: Returns an array of product secrets.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Deployment.Admin/locations/global/productSecrets/{productId}/secrets/{secretName}
endpoints.description: Retrieves the specific product secret details.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SECRETNAME}} with a real secretname. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Deployment.Admin/locations/global/productSecrets/{productId}/secrets/{secretName}/import
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SECRETNAME}} with a real secretname. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Deployment.Admin/locations/global/productSecrets/{productId}/secrets/{secretName}/validate
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SECRETNAME}} with a real secretname. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.
